description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the harbottle/puppet-mattermost:latest Docker image for all jobs and defines two stages: test and push. Add a test job in the test stage that runs the exact command "bundle exec rake spec". Add a push job in the push stage that runs manually, is limited to the master branch of the harbottle/puppet-mattermost project, and executes the commands "rm -f Vagrantfile", "rm -rf vagrant", and "bundle exec rake module:push" in that order.
